title: DRC Ebola outbreak: hundreds of suspected cases, no vaccine
content: A fast-spreading Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) has health workers rushing to stop transmission while the roll out of any potential vaccine is months away, the UN World Health Organization (WHO) said on Tuesday.

title: Ebola outbreak follows hunger and displacement crisis in DR Congo
content: A day after the World Health Organization (WHO) declared the new Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo an international emergency, top global disease transmission experts stressed that the chances of another global pandemic similar to the 2019 coronavirus emergency are increasing all the time.

title: Sudan hunger crisis deepens as UN warns millions face acute food shortages
content: Nearly 20 million people across Sudan are facing acute hunger and more than 800,000 children risk severe malnutrition this year, UN agencies warned on Friday, as civil war, mass displacement and collapsing food and health systems deepen one of the world’s worst humanitarian crises and push parts of the country closer to famine.

title: Somalia at ‘real risk of famine’ as Middle East war fallout continues
content: At least six million people in Somalia are going days without enough food, UN aid teams warned on Friday, highlighting that nearly two million of this number are young children “at high risk of illness or death”.

title: In Addis Ababa, Guterres urges reforms to give Africa stronger global voice
content: Africa’s rising influence is being constrained by outdated global institutions, unfair borrowing costs and cascading global crises, UN Secretary‑General António Guterres warned in Addis Ababa, as the United Nations and African Union reaffirmed their strategic partnership.

title: Chad’s refugee crisis overwhelms maternity care in east, UN agency warns
content: Many women in eastern Chad are being forced to give birth in overcrowded clinics with limited medicine, minimal equipment and severe shortages of anesthesia, as a worsening humanitarian crisis overwhelms the country’s fragile healthcare system, the UN reproductive health agency, UNFPA, warned on Tuesday.

title: Somalia teeters on the brink of catastrophe as hunger crisis deepens
content: “This is not a distant warning. This is a crisis that is unfolding right now and it's deepening quickly.”

title: Bahrain and US float Security Council resolution on the Strait of Hormuz
content: Bahrain and the United States have circulated a draft Security Council resolution calling for Iran to cease attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, their ambassadors outlined to journalists at UN Headquarters in New York on Thursday.
